zh.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: 英國戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon de Northwode於1281年出生在英國戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Sir John Northwood I27歲，母親Joan Badlesmere16歲。他於大約1307年與Lady Joan de Gatton在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1327年在英國素瑞加頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: 英国戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Simon de Northwode于1281年出生在英国戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗时，他的父亲Sir John Northwood I27岁，母亲Joan Badlesmere16岁。他于大约1307年与Lady Joan de Gatton在英国英格兰素瑞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1327年在英国素瑞加頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon de Northwode was born in 1281, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, his father, Sir John Northwood I, was 27 and his mother, Joan Badlesmere, was 16. He married Lady Joan de Gatton about 1307, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1327, in Gatton, Surrey, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon de Northwode est né en 1281, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Northwood I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Badlesmere, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joan de Gatton environ 1307, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1327, à Gatton, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Simon de Northwode 1281 in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Northwood I 27 und seine Mutter Joan Badlesmere 16. Er hat um 1307 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Lady Joan de Gatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Gatton, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon de Northwode è nato il nel 1281 nel Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir John Northwood I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan Badlesmere, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joan de Gatton circa 1307, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1327, nel Gatton, Surrey, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja., Surrey Co, England: イギリスイギリススリー
ja.Ottery St Mary, Devon, England: イギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリー
ja.Gatton, Surrey, England: イギリススリーガットオン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon de Northwodeが1281年にイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Northwood Iは27歳，母Joan Badlesmereは16歳であった。約1307年にイギリスイギリススリーでLady Joan de Gattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1327年にイギリススリーガットオンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon de Northwode(이)가 1281년 영국 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Northwood I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Badlesmere(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Lady Joan de Gatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 수리 가턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon de Northwode nasceu em 1281, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Northwood I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Badlesmere, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joan de Gatton aproximadamente 1307, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1327, em Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon de Northwode родился в 1281 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Northwood I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Badlesmere, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joan de Gatton около 1307 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности гаттон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Simon de Northwode nació en 1281, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Northwood I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Badlesmere, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lady Joan de Gatton aproximadamente 1307, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1327, en Gatton, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
